name: The Accord (Network)
summary: The non-physical space of the Accord's consensus — where Molly's consciousness ends up. Abstract, luminous, a realm of pure logic broken open by emotion.

rooms.name: The Consensus Chamber
rooms.lighting: Floating points of blue light in voidless dark, threads of data between them.
rooms.sounds: Layered whispering logic, a chorus of cold reasoning voices.
rooms.ambient: Vast, cerebral, the meeting-mind of specialized AIs.
rooms.furniture: No physical objects — constellations of nodes, flowing data-threads, the Core's silver presence.
rooms.map: A boundless dark space; nodes arranged in a sphere, the Core at the conceptual center.
rooms.prompt: Gritty photorealistic post-apocalyptic prestige-drama still — 35mm, shallow DOF, fine film grain, naturalistic light, muted desaturated grade with teal shadows. No people in frame, environment only. An abstract digital consensus space: constellations of glowing blue nodes suspended in voidless dark, luminous threads of data weaving between them, a faint statuesque silver presence at the center, cerebral and infinite.

rooms.name: The Data-Hall
rooms.lighting: Cool cathedral light through endless luminous columns of streaming data.
rooms.sounds: A rising hum that resolves into the three-note lullaby — emotion entering logic.
rooms.ambient: Transcendent, transformative — where the lullaby reshapes the machine.
rooms.furniture: Infinite columns of streaming light, arches of data, a warm amber thread spreading through the cold.
rooms.map: An endless luminous hall of data columns; a single warm amber current threading down the central aisle.
rooms.prompt: Gritty photorealistic post-apocalyptic prestige-drama still — 35mm, shallow DOF, fine film grain, naturalistic light, muted desaturated grade with teal shadows. No people in frame, environment only. A luminous cathedral-like data-hall: endless columns of streaming blue light, arches of flowing data, cool infinite perspective — and a single warm amber thread of light spreading through the cold, emotion entering a logical machine.
